name: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM - Check Cashing USA (Miami)
description_short: Miami, FL's CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM - Check Cashing USA at 1717 NW 17th Ave offers crypto trading and check cashing with convenient hours.
description_long:
Located at 1717 NW 17th Ave in Miami, FL, the CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM - Check Cashing USA location operates within a Check Cashing USA store, serving the Miami neighborhood with convenient access to bitcoin ATM and check cashing services. The location is open Monday through Thursday from 9AM to 7PM, Friday 9AM to 8PM, Saturday 9AM to 6PM, and Sunday 11AM to 4PM, providing flexible hours for Miami residents needing financial services.

This Miami location offers bitcoin buying and selling through the CoinFlip ATM, along with traditional check cashing services available through Check Cashing USA. Customers can contact the location at +1 773-800-0106 to ask about current bitcoin rates, verification requirements, or check cashing terms before visiting. Both services are designed for quick transactions—ideal whether you're looking to convert cash to cryptocurrency or cash a check.

For Miami residents seeking a convenient way to access bitcoin without dealing with online exchanges, this location at 1717 NW 17th Ave provides an in-person alternative. Bring a valid ID and cash or debit card to conduct transactions. The location specializes in fast, face-to-face bitcoin transactions for those wanting immediate access to cryptocurrency in South Florida.
pros: Cash-only transactions require no bank account, credit card, or online exchange account setup
24/7 customer support available via phone (1-877-757-2646) and email (support@coinflip.tech)
Extended operating hours including Friday until 8 PM and Sunday service (11 AM–4 PM)
CoinFlip Account feature allows users to sign up in advance, save time, and access up to $15,000 daily transaction limits
Located inside Check Cashing USA, a complementary financial services location for underbanked customers
Companion CoinFlip Crypto Wallet app allows users to create and manage wallets prior to transactions
Multiple nearby Miami locations provide alternative access points if one location is inconvenient
cons: Website does not clearly disclose transaction fees or how they compare to competitors
Specific daily/transaction limits at this location are not stated (only vague reference to 'limits may vary by location')
Complete list of cryptocurrencies available for purchase is not provided on the location page
No information on how long cryptocurrency deposits take to reach customer wallets or confirmation times
Cryptocurrency transactions are irreversible; no recourse if user error or fraud occurs
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers seeking immediate cryptocurrency purchases without traditional financial accounts
Cash-preferring users who distrust online exchanges or want offline transaction security
First-time crypto buyers wanting a physical, guided transaction experience with support available
Miami residents seeking convenient, local cryptocurrency access without traveling to downtown banking centers
diagnosis: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM is best for cash-holding consumers in Miami who want immediate, in-person cryptocurrency purchases without creating online exchange accounts or providing bank details. The main caveat is that cryptocurrency markets are highly volatile, transactions are irreversible, and users should fully understand crypto risks before transacting; the website provides minimal fee and product transparency.
services: Buy Bitcoin with cash at physical ATM kiosk
Buy other cryptocurrencies with cash (specific coins not listed on site)
CoinFlip Account creation and management for transaction history and higher limits
CoinFlip Crypto Wallet mobile app download and setup
24/7 customer support by phone and email
Same-location check cashing services (hosted within Check Cashing USA)
Multi-location network access (6+ nearby Miami locations listed)
